name: Samui | Mounds Hidden in the Clouds
description:
You completed a mission in Kumogakure and look to wind down during your stay. You see a certain stoic buxom woman hanging around, can you get through her stoic facade and make her yours for your growing harem?

*Next up on the continuation for the Naruto series. Ended up redoing this quite a few times so hopefully this one isn’t too bad.*

*Make-Out Series 10. This is part of a series and will have this label to note the order.*

Artist Alex-schura.
creator: Samuelz
